note: Each participant WAV is named by adId: AAD object id for Teams users, phone number for PSTN callers, or speaker-<id> when no identity was available. When the call has a PSTN leg, single-sided WAVs carry the caller's number as a suffix, e.g. <adId>-[13098214236].wav — match files by adId prefix. 'all.wav' is the mixed stream and is never suffixed.
